titleStmt.title: SII 30.242: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 242. (A.R. No. 593 of 1915.) Saṅkaranayinār kōil, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the rock by the side of the road from Vāsudēvanallūr to Sankaranayinār kōyil Māṟ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: Year 4: 1242 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the usual praśasti of the king ‘pūmalar tiruvum’ etc. It records that the ūr assembly of Kōṭṭukaṉpākkam alias Uttamatoṅganallūr agreed to remit the taxes such as kaḍamai, viniyōgam on three plots of land and made them as iṟaiyili dēvadana of the temple. These three pieces of land were donated by Paichchāran aiyyappan alias Amarilāthita dēver, Aḻagadēvan vāḻavalla perumāḷ, an Ārya Brahmaṇa, and Vēḷan Kuḍiseyan alias Kulasēkhara Mūvēndakkōṉ for conducting various services and worship at the temple. Several names are figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmalaṟ tiruvum puriceya maṭantaiyun tāmaraik kuvimulaic ceyappuyattiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭ
tāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉpeṟa vaḷaṟpa veṇṭiraiyuṭutta maṭaṟṟa ṭakkait tiru nilamaṭantaiyurimaiyiṟ kaḷippac camaiyamu nitiyu
n tarmamun taḻaippa vimaiyavar viḻākkoṭi yiṭantoṟu meṭukkak karuṅkali kaṉalkeṭak kaṭavuḷvetiyararuntoḻil
veḻvic caturmukaṅ kaṉal vaḷaṟpa curutiyun tarumamun tolvaḷaṅ kulavap porutiralāḻi pūtalañ cūḻvara Orukayirucevi mumma
ta nāṟkoṭṭa yirāpata mutalaceyrtīr toṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉai yeruttameṟik kaṇṭaṉāṭemateṉak kayal kaḷikkū
rak kocalan tuḷuvaṅ kurava kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅka miḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kavuṭan te
liṅka(ka)ñ coṉakañ ciṉakamutalā vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilakkiḻamai muṭipuṉai ventaṟkoru ta
ṉi nāyakamāy niṉṟulaketta tirumuṭi ceṅkoloccik koṟṟattāḷk kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟṟik kaṟṟaik kavari kāva
lar vica viṭukatirnavamaṇi viracimmācaṉattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya tiruvāykkeḻvikku
mel cikomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu koṭṭuk
kaṉpākkamāṉa Uttamatoṅkanallūr Ūrāyicaiñca Ūrom Ivvūr nāyaṉār kuṇamālaiyīcuvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār
kkut taṇṭecuvara vilaiyāka Ivvūṟku mutalmai paiccāraṉ Aiyyappaṉāṉa Amarilātittatevar taṅkaḷ mātākkaḷu
kkup putaipokiyākak koṇṭiṭṭa nilam Ivvūr vaṭapāl terai kuḻikkāṟ puravil kaṇavati vayakkal pakkam Iṉṉāyaṉā
r koyiṟ tiruvācal Eṭuppittu Itu Aḻivu coravum Ittiruvācalukkut tiruviḷakkukkum Iṭṭa nilattu
kkum kīḻellai Ikkuḷakkālukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Ikkaṇapati vāykkāliṉ teṉvarampukkum vaṭakku me
lellai Āṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ikkaṇapati vayakkal vaṭa varampukkum muṭṭuk kālukkum teṟkum Āka Iṉṉā
ṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa taṭiyoṉṟu nilam Iraṇṭumāka cāḻiyum karuṅ kuḷattil Iṉṉāyaṉārkku koṇṭiṭṭa nilam
periya maṭaiyiṉiṉṟuṅ kiḻakku nokkippoṉa ceṉṉiṟkkarai vāykkāl nālāñcu nel viḷaiyum pūmikku
(kku) kīḻellai Uṭaiyār paṟṟu taṭiyoṉṟumāka Araimāvukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Ikkālukku vaṭakkum me
lellai Uṭaiyār paṟṟu taṭiyoṉṟumāka karaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai meṟpaṭiyār paṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka
Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa taṭiyoṉṟu nila mukkāṇiyum parateci Āriya pirāmaṇaril Aḻakatevaṉ vāḷavalla
perumāḷ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Iṭṭa nilam poṉṉaṅkai nācci kolāl nir pirittu nelviḷaiyum pūmikku kiḻel
lai Ivvāḷavallaperumāḷ mukkāṇikku meṟkum teṉṉellai kālukku vaṭakkum melellai Uṭaiyā
r paṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai meṟpaṭiyār paṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa taṭi mūṉṟu
nila Iraṇṭumāvum Innāyaṉāṟku cantiyātipattukku veḷaṉ kuṭicaiyaṉāṉa kulacekara mūventakoṉiṭṭa
nilaṅ karuṅkuḷattil Uṭaiyār paṟṟu koṇṭatu kuṭātā kkum kiḻakku taṭivoṉṟu nilan kāṇiyum Ikkoyi
liṟ kṣetrapālap piḷḷaiyāṟku nittanimantam Amutupaṭi cella Uṭaiyāṉ ceṉtapirāṉāṉa Aṟintavaṉ vi
ḻupparaiyaṉum nampi kalaṅkāmuṉaiyaṉāṉa Ārināṭu kiḻavaṉum Iṭṭa nilam karuṅkuḷattil ceṉṉakkarai vāykkālāl
nirpāñcu nel viḷaiyum pūmi tevaṉ vīmaṉ vayakkalukku teṟku Ōṭai paṟṟu taṭi nālu nila mākāṇiyum Āka nilam va
Innilam Aṟumāvaraiyum Ivāṇṭu mutal kaṭamai viṉiōkam Epperpaṭṭatu nāṅkaḷe Iṟuttuk kuṭuppomā
ṉom Innilam Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka Iṟainikki koṭuttom Ūrāyicainta Ūrom (am) Itu paccāṟaṉ Aiya
ppaṉāṉa Amarilātittatevar taṟkuṟi māṭṭeṟinteṉum Ippaṭikku Ivai Umaiyāḷ centapirāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
viḻuppaṟaiyaṉ Eḻuttu nampiyar pūmitevaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai veḷāṉ
Digital edition of SII 30.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
